sources.label: Mock local samples
sources.description: Reads repository-local data/mock_samples.json. No network, no API key, no external last30days-skill.

sources.label: Reddit via last30days-skill
sources.description: Uses local last30days-skill with --quick --search=reddit. This is the current real social-data source.

sources.label: ScrapeCreators Reddit API
sources.description: Opt-in API-backed Reddit source for when public Reddit JSON keeps returning 403 or 429. It is not the default live source; select it explicitly with --data-source scrapecreators_reddit.

sources.label: ScrapeCreators YouTube Search API
sources.description: Explicit opt-in YouTube Search source. It is not the default live source; select it explicitly with --data-source scrapecreators_youtube_search.

sources.label: YouTube transcripts
sources.description: Reserved future source. Do not install yt-dlp or enable YouTube in the current phase.

sources.label: Pinterest visual trend source
sources.description: Reserved future visual trend source. No provider is configured in the current phase.
